summary: Worked on Telegram automation via an n8n node fork, and built tools for GitHub profile generation. Developed a Windows file-tagging application and a personal image labeler, while maintaining a Neovim setup and a Clash proxy fork.

items.title: GitHub profile automation scripts
items.description: Developed scripts to generate custom profile cards and a CV timeline for the GitHub profile.

items.title: Profile card generator
items.description: Built a tool that produces sidebar cards and a CV timeline SVG for the GitHub profile, with light/dark theme support.

items.title: Clash proxy fork for FlClash client
items.description: Maintained a fork of Clash.Meta to expose APIs needed by the FlClash client.

items.title: Telegram n8n node fork
items.description: Iterated on a Telegram integration n8n node fork, focusing on CI stability and new trigger support.

items.title: Windows file-tagging utility
items.description: Polished the file-tagging tool for Windows Explorer with README and release updates.

items.title: Neovim IDE configuration
items.description: Set up a complete Neovim IDE with treesitter, LSP, and clipboard for remote sessions.

items.title: Image labeling tool
items.description: Developed a lightweight on-host YOLO labeler for personal use.

items.title: Telegram n8n node fork
items.description: Maintained the Telegram n8n node fork with version bumps and session storage improvements.

items.title: Windows file-tagging utility
items.description: Worked on v2.0 release of the file-tagging tool, targeting Microsoft Store and extending metadata support.

items.title: Telegram n8n node fork
items.description: Started the TelePilot n8n node fork, adding Docker deployment and initial feature work.

items.title: Windows file-tagging utility
items.description: Started development of the file-tagging tool for Windows Explorer, building core functionality.
